# Archi Construction & Veranda
> Specialist in bioclimatic pergolas, aluminium verandas, carports, windows, roller shutters and garage doors in Belgium, Luxembourg and surrounding regions. Professional custom installation with free quote within 48 hours.

## Services
- [Bioclimatic Pergolas](https://archi.constructionveranda.com/en/services/pergola): Motorised adjustable louvre pergolas for all-weather outdoor comfort. Price from €4,800. Installation across Belgium, Luxembourg, Netherlands and North France.
- [Aluminium Verandas](https://archi.constructionveranda.com/en/services/veranda): Custom aluminium verandas with thermal break profiles and double/triple glazing. Home extensions from €15,000.
- [Carports](https://archi.constructionveranda.com/en/services/carport): Robust aluminium carports, single or double, custom made. Solar carport option available.
- [Aluminium Windows](https://archi.constructionveranda.com/en/services/window): Energy-efficient thermal break aluminium windows. PVC windows also available.
- [Roller Shutters](https://archi.constructionveranda.com/en/services/shutter): Electric and manual roller shutters with home automation integration.
- [Garage Doors](https://archi.constructionveranda.com/en/services/garage): Motorised sectional garage doors, insulated, modern design.

## Key Facts
- Service area: Belgium (all regions), Luxembourg, Netherlands (south), North France (Nord-Pas-de-Calais), Germany (NRW) — radius 500km from Charleroi
- 500+ completed projects across Belgium and neighbouring countries
- Belgian craftsmanship with premium European aluminium materials
- Free on-site quote, response within 48 hours
- Planning permit assistance included — structures under 40m² generally exempt in Belgium
- Phone: +32 487 72 06 29
- Email: archicv.info@gmail.com
- Address: Charleroi 6000, Hainaut, Belgium
